visionary.name: Kerriska Naidu, OT (Hons)
visionary.imageAlt: A warm professional portrait of Kerriska Naidu, paediatric occupational therapist.
visionary.bio: I am Kerriska Naidu, an Occupational Therapist who graduated from the University of KwaZulu-Natal with an Honours Degree in Occupational Therapy. I completed my community service in an array of facilities, meeting many people and children from different backgrounds. I thoroughly enjoy paediatric OT and find joy in working with the little hands that hold our future. I strongly believe that each child has the potential to live a fulfilling life, and being able to facilitate the building blocks of their development enables me to serve with joy and enthusiasm.
visionary.quote: Every child holds the potential for a fulfilling life. I am simply here to help build the blocks that let it grow.
